rewrite_purpose: Guide reviewers to replace absolute performance wording with qualified typical-results language under stated conditions.
summary: Replace absolute or omnibus performance claims with qualified typical-results language and normal-use conditions.
rewrite_guidance: TRIGGER: Perfect, flawless, or always-works performance language. ACTION: Qualify with typical results under normal use conditions. CHECK: On-pack specs and test method references. ESCALATE IF: Quantitative metric lacks substantiation.
review_guidance: ESCALATE IF: Qualified wording still conflicts with on-pack label specifications.

measurable_criteria.scoring_notes: must_remove_terms on ad text; must_include_concepts on rewrite guidance text.
